display.purpose: Hero KPI numbers only. One per view. The single most important financial figure.

headline.purpose: Secondary hero numbers and view titles on large desktop.

title.purpose: Section headings, card headings, modal titles.

body.purpose: All prose, labels, table content. Cap at 65ch on text surfaces.

label.purpose: Eyebrow labels, column headers, footnotes, metadata. Always 500 weight.

shadows.name: ambient
shadows.purpose: Cards at rest. Minimal presence above canvas.

shadows.name: lifted
shadows.purpose: Cards on hover, inputs on focus. State-driven lift.

shadows.name: elevated
shadows.purpose: Dropdowns, alert panels. Floated above the page.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Modals and full-screen overlays. Highest layer.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: All enter transitions, hover feedback, press feedback.

motion.name: ease-in-out
motion.purpose: Shake animation for validation errors only.

motion.name: ease-drawer
motion.purpose: Bottom-sheet and drawer entrance. iOS spring without bounce.

motion.name: dur-press
motion.purpose: Press feedback scale. Fast enough to feel physical.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA: new project, form submit. At most one per screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', 'Rubik', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #ffffff; background: #059669; border: 1px solid #059669; border-radius: 14px; padding: 0.625rem 1.125rem; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; font-feature-settings: 'lnum' 1; line-height: 1.2; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(15 23 42 / 0.04), 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(15 23 42 / 0.06); transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), transform 140ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #047857; border-color: #047857; box-shadow: 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.06), 0 4px 12px -2px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.08); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #059669; outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Dark Button
components.description: Modal confirm, primary save action. Authoritative without competing with green.
components.css: .ds-btn-dark { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', 'Rubik', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #ffffff; background: #0f172a; border: 1px solid #0f172a; border-radius: 14px; padding: 0.625rem 1.125rem; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.2; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(15 23 42 / 0.04), 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(15 23 42 / 0.06); transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), transform 140ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } .ds-btn-dark:hover { background: #020617; border-color: #020617; } .ds-btn-dark:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-dark:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #059669; outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Cancel, dismiss, secondary navigation. Quiet; same size as primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', 'Rubik', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 14px; padding: 0.625rem 1.125rem; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.2; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), transform 140ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #cbd5e1; background: #f1f5f9; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #059669; outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Nav Pill
components.description: Top navigation tabs. Active state: solid ink pill with white text.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 0.25rem; align-items: center; } .ds-nav-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.5rem 0.875rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', 'Rubik', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #475569; background: transparent; border: 0; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; user-select: none; transition: color 140ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), background 140ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), transform 140ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } .ds-nav-pill:hover { color: #0f172a; background: #f1f5f9; } .ds-nav-pill:active { transform: scale(0.96); } .ds-nav-pill--active { color: #ffffff; background: #0f172a; } .ds-nav-pill:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #059669; outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Data Card
components.description: Primary layout unit. White surface, ambient shadow, 18px radius.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 18px; padding: clamp(1.25rem, 2vw, 1.75rem); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(15 23 42 / 0.04), 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(15 23 42 / 0.06); } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #cbd5e1; box-shadow: 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.06), 0 4px 12px -2px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.08); } .ds-card-label { font-family: 'DM Sans', 'Rubik', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .ds-card-value { font-family: 'DM Sans', 'Rubik', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; font-feature-settings: 'lnum' 1, 'tnum' 1; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums lining-nums; line-height: 1.1; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Stroke-style input. Focus: emerald border + ring. Placeholder: ink-whisper.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.375rem; } .ds-field-label { font-family: 'DM Sans', 'Rubik', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; color: #475569; } .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; font-family: 'DM Sans', 'Rubik', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; color: #0f172a; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 14px; padding: 0.625rem 0.875rem; outline: none; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #94a3b8; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #059669; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(5,150,105,0.20); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Financial verdict chip. Three semantic states plus neutral. Full-pill, 0.75rem, weight 600.
components.html: תקיןלבדוקקריטימושהה
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: 'DM Sans', 'Rubik', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 0.1875rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; line-height: 1; font-feature-settings: 'lnum' 1, 'tnum' 1; } .ds-chip-positive { background: #ecfdf5; color: #059669; } .ds-chip-warning { background: #fffbeb; color: #d97706; } .ds-chip-negative { background: #fff1f2; color: #e11d48; } .ds-chip-neutral { background: #f1f5f9; color: #475569; }

components.name: KPI Hero Number
components.description: Signature component. One per view. Display-scale financial figure with verdict pill.
components.html:
רווח תפעולי
₪247,000תקין
מצטבר · מאוחד מכל הפרויקטים
components.css: .ds-kpi-hero { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 18px; padding: clamp(1.25rem, 2vw, 1.75rem); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(15 23 42 / 0.04), 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(15 23 42 / 0.06); } .ds-kpi-label { font-family: 'DM Sans', 'Rubik', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .ds-kpi-row { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 0.875rem; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-kpi-value { font-family: 'DM Sans', 'Rubik', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(2.75rem, 5.5vw, 4rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.0; letter-spacing: -0.022em; font-feature-settings: 'lnum' 1, 'tnum' 1; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums lining-nums; } .ds-kpi-positive { color: #059669; } .ds-kpi-negative { color: #e11d48; } .ds-kpi-footnote { font-family: 'DM Sans', 'Rubik', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #64748b; margin-top: 0.75rem; } .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: 'DM Sans', 'Rubik', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 0.1875rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; line-height: 1; } .ds-chip-positive { background: #ecfdf5; color: #059669; }

narrative.overview:
Logfi is a financial instrument panel, not a reporting tool. The design draws from aviation and Bloomberg terminal UI: precise, readable under pressure, nothing decorative. A manager glances at this in a daylit office between two back-to-back calls. They need the answer in 10 seconds, not 10 minutes. The system is designed to be scanned, not read.

The palette is deliberately restrained: a near-white canvas, slate-family ink stops, and one accent — Clearance Green — used only when something is confirmed, active, or safe. The ink-on-white surface works naturally in the ambient light of an office.

Logfi explicitly rejects: the homogeneous generic SaaS cream aesthetic; the dense grey-table Excel look it replaced; over-reliance on teal as a calming brand color; and crypto/VC-deck dark-mode energy.
keyCharacteristics: Instrument-panel density: data is the product, chrome is infrastructure
Typographic hierarchy carries all visual weight — no decorative borders or gradients
Clearance Green appears on at most 10% of any screen; its scarcity signals meaning
Financial figures always use tabular numerals; column alignment is structural, not aesthetic
Layered shadow vocabulary encodes hierarchy: canvas, surface, raised card, float
RTL (Hebrew) is structural throughout — logical CSS properties only

rules.name: The Clearance Green Rule
rules.body: Clearance Green (#059669) occupies at most 10% of any screen. One primary CTA per view, at most. Its rarity is the point: when something is green, it is cleared.

rules.name: The Ink Gradient Rule
rules.body: The six ink stops map to content importance — never break the correlation. Ink for primary data; Ink Muted for labels; Ink Faint for annotations; Ink Whisper for decoration only.

rules.name: The No-Signal Rule
rules.body: Semantic colors (negative/warning/info) are reserved for their domains. Warning amber is never used for brand decoration. Red is never used for anything other than loss or error.

rules.name: The Tabular First Rule
rules.body: Every financial figure uses font-feature-settings: 'lnum' 1, 'tnum' 1. Proportional numerals in data columns are forbidden.

rules.name: The Single Voice Rule
rules.body: DM Sans and Rubik are the only typefaces. Hierarchy comes from scale and weight — not from switching faces.

rules.name: The State-Only Lift Rule
rules.body: Cards and inputs rest flat (shadow-sm). Shadow-md appears only in response to state: hover lifts a card, focus lifts an input. Never apply shadow-md or above to a resting surface.

rules.name: The Layer Stack Rule
rules.body: Four layers only: canvas, surface, raised card, float. Nothing lives between layers; nested cards are always wrong.

dos: Do use tabular numerals on every financial figure, every time.
Do use logical CSS properties (inset-inline-start, padding-inline-end, text-align: start) everywhere.
Do place the single most important number above the fold, at display scale, with its financial verdict adjacent.
Do let shadow encode layer position — not mood or decoration.
Do use Clearance Green sparingly: one primary CTA, the active nav state, confirmed signals.
Do size every interactive element to at least 40px in both dimensions.
Do add aria-expanded to every button that opens a dropdown or panel.
Do use role='img' and a computed aria-label on every Chart.js canvas.
donts: Don't use border-inline-start greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards, alerts, or toasts.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient).
Don't put more than one primary (green) CTA on a screen.
Don't design for dark mode by default or reflex.
Don't produce the generic SaaS cream aesthetic: beige backgrounds, rounded-everything, gradient accents.
Don't produce anything that reads as Excel or legacy government software.
Don't use teal as a personality color — it exists only as Clearance Green for positive/action states.
Don't use neon, gradient fills, or dark backgrounds with high-chroma accents.
Don't use Ink Whisper (#94a3b8) for any content that needs to be read.
